siteMetadata.description: a few of my favorite things

nodes.excerpt: How To Set A Fire And Why - Jesse Ball | Review The Smart Girl's Guide to Privacy: A Privacy Guide for the Rest of Us - Violet Blue | Publisher's Site The Mythical Man-Month - Fred Brooks | Read on archive.org | Chapter 2 PDF Nine Stories - JD Salinger | A Perfect Day for Bananafish PDF

It being summer, I've been running about with the incredible new Etymotic ER4XR hooked up to my iPhone 6s instead of my usual dedicated music player since pocket space is limited without a bulky winter coat. These amazing little IEMs are an updated version of the historic ER4S which, if you are…

I rediscovered Internet Archive as a source of some glorious music, so my picks for May are all from there. Live recordings and old blues recordings can get a little tinny at times, so I've mostly listened to these recordings via my KEF Q300 loudspeakers or my Fostex T50RP MK3 headphones. You can…
